There's also a part about 2,000 thunderstorms every minute and 100 lightning strikes per second. Looking at the options: A) Only a small number of lightning flashes occur on earth. B) Lightning flashes usually jump from one cloud to another. So C says lightning (speed of light) is 5 times faster than thunder (speed of sound). But that's not accurate.
